title: The Field Where Choices Have Footprints

features.name: the parallel paths
features.desc-on-touch: Two sets of footprints run through the grid simultaneously. One path taken, one path left behind. The earth keeps score of both.

features.name: the divergence point
features.desc-on-touch: Where the paths split, the grid itself fractures into two coordinates. You stand in both futures at once.

features.name: memory in coordinates
features.desc-on-touch: The grid marks each step taken. The coordinates record the path you chose. But the ghost coordinates are here too—measured but not walked.

inscription: you chose once, but the earth keeps score of twice; the grid measures both the path you take and the one that still waits in the field

file.name: Coordinate_Record_Dual_Path_Study_Undated.txt
file.note: A record of two simultaneous journeys through the same field. The coordinates diverge at a single point. Both paths are marked as 'taken'.

reverie.title: REVERIE — the field at the moment of choice
narr: katita stands at the divergence; you stand with her.
the paths are equally possible. 'the archive', she
says, 'doesn't choose. it measures all the lives you
could have lived and files them as true.' you know
she's talking about herself too—the version that went
deeper still. the field records them both forever.

exits.label: back to the field where both choices still exist as one
along the ghost-path where the other footprints lead
toward the horizon where both paths converge again
